prompt: A cinematic still from a {argument name="movie era and genre" default="1990s American sci-fi action movie"}. A {argument name="male character description" default="rugged male protagonist with a dirty face and a distressed brown leather jacket"} is {argument name="action" default="desperately dangling from the edge of a rocky cliff"}, gripping the rough stone with both hands. Above him, a {argument name="female character description" default="female-presenting android with pale skin, a sharp black bob haircut, and visible robotic joints on her arms"} is calmly looking down at him, resting her hands on the cliff edge. The background features a {argument name="setting" default="vast, deep canyon with a river winding through it under an overcast, dramatic sky"}. Shot on 35mm film, realistic textures, dramatic cinematic lighting.
translatedPrompt: 一张来自 {argument name="movie era and genre" default="1990 年代美国科幻动作电影"} 的电影剧照。一名 {argument name="male character description" default="面容脏兮兮、身穿破旧棕色皮夹克的硬汉男主角"} 正 {argument name="action" default="绝望地悬挂在岩石悬崖边缘"}，双手紧紧抓着粗糙的岩石。在他上方，一个 {argument name="female character description" default="皮肤苍白、留着利落黑色波波头、手臂上有明显机械关节的女性机器人"} 正冷静地俯视着他，双手搭在悬崖边缘。背景是 {argument name="setting" default="一个广阔深邃的峡谷，一条河流在阴沉、戏剧性的天空下蜿蜒流过"}。使用 35mm 胶片拍摄，纹理逼真，具有戏剧性的电影级光影效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 90 年代科幻电影悬崖惊险剧照：生成一张电影感剧照，画面展示一名角色悬挂在悬崖边，而一个机器人正冷眼旁观，非常适合复古科幻概念设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: overcast]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
